insight: Orbit uses warm-editorial-analytical direction. Dark primary (#141210), slate blue accent (#4A7FA5), Geist body, Instrument Serif for person names only, Geist Mono for data. Muted semantic colors (sage/amber-gold/terracotta). Memorable thing: serious honest software. User explicitly rejected amber in favor of slate blue to differentiate from NoJetLag.

Relationship/personal-analytics apps (Day One, Clay, Bearable) all use warm/encouraging design with light mode, pastel gradients, and motivational copy. For Orbit specifically, this fights the value prop — users come for uncomfortable honest data. Design austere, not warm. Signal flags not traffic lights.
